title: QA-only: walk /trading and /brain, capture screenshots, verify no console errors
context: We want a baseline QA run after the recent UI tweaks landed on staging. No code changes — just the autonomous Playwright walk and a Darren final report.
problem: We don't have a current PASS/FAIL baseline for the /trading and /brain routes against the latest staging deploy.
expected_behavior: Playwright autonomous-site-qa walks both routes end-to-end, screenshots every page, reports persistence checks, and produces a clean qa-report.md.
acceptance_criteria: Playwright run completes without test failures.
Console errors and page errors are zero or fully enumerated.
qa_requirements: All routes from the navigation are visited.
Screenshots uploaded as the playwright-report artifact.
Persistence checks are skipped if no save buttons present.
